title: Profiling & Optimization
description: Understand CPU/GPU profiling, frame time budgeting, hotspot identification, and memory leak tracking.
learningObjectives: Identify frame execution bottlenecks using profile instrumentation tools (Unreal Insights)
Differentiate CPU bottlenecks from GPU-bound pixel shading constraints
Identify expensive heap allocation hotspots in render tick sweeps

sections.title: Frame Time Budgets and Profilers
sections.content:
Profiling measures execution performance. Frame Time Budget is the maximum time allowed for updates (16.6ms for 60 FPS, 33.3ms for 30 FPS). Profilers track call hierarchies and execution durations. 

1. **CPU Bottlenecks**: Caused by heavy collision logic, AI navigation, or serialization.
2. **GPU Bottlenecks**: Caused by overdrawn transparent materials, dense lighting grids, or heavy post-processing shaders.
